description:
Perform a bone composition analysis on the loaded CT Cranium dataset. Create segmentation masks for 'Compact Bone (Adult)' and 'Spongial Bone (Adult)' using standard presets and generate 3D surfaces to determine their volumes. Create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/bone_report.txt containing the volume of each in mL and the ratio of Compact to Spongial bone using the following format:

Compact Bone Volume: [Value] mL
Spongial Bone Volume: [Value] mL
Ratio: [Value]

Save the InVesalius project to /home/ga/Documents/bone_analysis.inv3. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
